mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chapter_questions (chapter_id, question_id, question_type, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.chapterId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.questionType}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt})

INSERT INTO chapter_questions (chapter_id, question_id, question_type, created_at) VALUES
(#{chapterQuestion.chapterId}, #{chapterQuestion.questionId}, #{chapterQuestion.questionType}, #{chapterQuestion.createdAt})
